profiles.name: The Lantern Keeper
profiles.description: Optional campaign rules for a Lantern Keeper traveler. Species, Origin, Class, level, and starting knack belong to this campaign; Calling and emergent practice remain separate.
profiles.prompt: What kind of traveler reaches the last light?
profiles.class_prompt: Which Lantern Keeper campaign path will you use?

species.label: Human
species.detail: adaptable, familiar, and hard to surprise twice
species.title: Human
species.description: A human traveler with practical hands and a face the road has not finished writing.
species.visual_prompt: human traveler, expressive face, practical layered road clothes

species.label: Mouse
species.detail: small, quick, and attentive to overlooked things
species.title: Mouse
species.description: A small mouse traveler with bright eyes, careful paws, and an instinct for the useful edge of a room.
species.visual_prompt: anthropomorphic mouse traveler, bright eyes, careful paws, small practical satchel

species.label: Badger
species.detail: sturdy, patient, and difficult to hurry
species.title: Badger
species.description: A broad badger traveler with weathered fur, a patient stance, and room for one more burden.
species.visual_prompt: anthropomorphic badger traveler, weathered fur, broad patient posture

origins.label: The Wayside Inn
origins.detail: you learned people by the state of their boots
origins.title: the Wayside Inn
origins.description: They grew up around kettle steam, wet cloaks, and stories told once the door was barred.
origins.visual_prompt: warm wayside inn details, kettle steam, patched travel cloak

origins.label: The Open Road
origins.detail: home was whichever milepost still had daylight
origins.title: the Open Road
origins.description: They learned to sleep lightly, mend straps in rain, and remember every honest milepost.
origins.visual_prompt: open road details, weathered map ribbon, rain-mended traveling gear

origins.label: The Old Chapel
origins.detail: you know which old customs still keep people safe
origins.title: the Old Chapel
origins.description: They remember soot-black rafters, small bells, and rules whose reasons were never written down.
origins.visual_prompt: old roadside chapel details, small brass bell, soot-marked cloth

choices.label: Lantern Warden
choices.detail: hold the line and bring people home
choices.calling: I keep a light burning when others lose the road.
choices.title: Lantern Warden
choices.description: A steady road-guard with a battered shield, a hooded lamp, and no habit of abandoning stragglers.

choices.label: Mothwood Guide
choices.detail: read tracks, weather, and frightened silences
choices.calling: I find the path that still has living footprints on it.
choices.title: Mothwood Guide
choices.description: A weather-wise scout carrying chalk, twine, and a map corrected more often than it is folded.

choices.label: Hedge Mender
choices.calling: I mend what the dark road tries to break.
choices.title: Hedge Mender
choices.description: A traveling fixer whose satchel holds bandages, wire, tea leaves, and exactly the wrong-sized screwdriver.
